events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Fen Marsh asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Dax Iron dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

## Year 63

### Events
- [YEL] **equipment_failure**: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
- [GRN] **alien_signal**: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
- [GRN] **earth_contact**: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

**Activity:** mediate(4), code(3), farm(3), cooperate(2), pray(2)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 82%

### Sub-simulations (8)
- depth-1 aura-kai: -0.03348517570628745
- depth-1 zeph-wind: 0
- depth-1 ora-flame: 1.1

** DEATH: Ember Veg-II — radiation exposure **

*META: Fen Marsh asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'*

*META: Dax Iron dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.*

diaries.text:
**Rust Tid** (fire/pioneer) — Year 63

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

Another system down.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Rust Tid, pioneer*

**Dax Iron** (fire/soldier) — Year 63

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

Another system down.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Dax Iron, soldier*

**Ember Sto** (earth/sentinel) — Year 63

Another year. We are still here.

Another system down.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Ember Sto, sentinel*
